news.title: Apple AI Lawsuit Settlement Puts Spotlight On iPhone Marketing And Risk
news.summary: Apple, ticker NasdaqGS:AAPL, has agreed to a $250 million settlement in a class-action lawsuit. The case centers on claims that 2024 iPhone models misrepresented artificial intelligence features to consumers. The settlement is subject to court approval and could result in payments to eligible customers. news.title: Brunswick and Callaway Golf Company Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
news.summary: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after consumer discretionary stocks pulled back, led by a plunge in Lululemon as the company cut its full-year revenue guidance to $11.0–$11.15 billion from $11.35–$11.5 billion, citing weaker US consumer traffic, brand backlash on social media, and underperforming product launches.
